APPEARANCES - ATTY. TATIANA SMALL OF LAFAYETTE & KUMAGAI LLP, TEL. NO. 357-4600 MOVING PARTY;

RULING - MATTER WAS ADDED LATE IN THE CALENDAR DUE TO CLERICAL ERROR AND THERE WAS NO TENTATIVE RULING ISSUED. Verified Application To Admit Counsel Pro Hac Vice Of Courney Menges for the Defendant Macy's West Stores, Incorporated is Granted. Proof of Payment to the State bar was presented in open court. Order signed in open court. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189
